_publications._publicationTitle: Patient-Derived Tumor Organoid Rings for Histologic Characterization and High-Throughput Screening

_contextSnippet: After 3 days, proceed with drug treatment...Positive controls (in our case, Staurosporine at 1 μM and 10 μM) are placed in the corner wells
details: Drug treatment begins at day 3 post-seeding; viability endpoint assessed by CellTiter-Glo 3D ATP-release assay (luminescence); positive controls are staurosporine at 1 μM and 10 μM placed in corner wells, vehicle controls distributed across the plate; rings must appear homogeneous with no broken rings or bubbles for valid results
